title: potentilla × trefferi
intro: Potentilla × trefferi, a hybrid of the potentilla plant, is a flowering shrub known for its vibrant orange flowers and robust growth. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating a variety of health conditions. The medicinal properties of potentilla × trefferi have been shown to provide numerous health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health. Potentilla × trefferi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with herbal preparations typically involving the roots and leaves of the plant.
